name: Code Index — Full Re-Index
description: Triggers a full re-index of the entire project. Run the full indexer script, read its JSON output, then ingest into KB via MCP tools.

then.prompt:
Run the full code intelligence indexer by executing: npx ts-node .analysis/code-intelligence/scripts/src/full-indexer.ts

After the script completes:
1. Read the JSON output from .analysis/code-intelligence/kb-payloads.json
2. For each payload, ingest into the Knowledge Base using mcp_knowledge_base_kb_ingest with the title, content, tags, and project fields
3. Report the indexing summary (total files, modules, classes, functions, parse errors, elapsed time)
